tools.name: get_dashboard
tools.description: Get the full dashboard overview showing all monitored API endpoints with their current status (up/degraded/down/maintenance), response time, uptime percentage, and health score.

tools.name: get_health
tools.description: Get the overall system health check showing database status and server health.

tools.name: get_endpoint_status
tools.description: Get detailed status of a specific API endpoint including current verdict, response time, uptime history, and recent pings.

tools.name: get_endpoint_pings
tools.description: Get recent ping history for a specific endpoint showing response times and verdicts over time.

tools.name: get_public_status
tools.description: Get the public-facing status page data showing all endpoints with their status for sharing with users.
